sql: SELECT instance_name, host_name, status, database_status FROM v$instance
SELECT name, dbid, created, log_mode, open_mode, force_logging, flashback_on FROM v$database

SELECT a.tablespace_name, ROUND(a.bytes/1024/1024) AS total_mb, ROUND(b.bytes/1024/1024) AS free_mb, ROUND((a.bytes-b.bytes)/a.bytes*100) AS used_pct FROM (SELECT tablespace_name, SUM(bytes) AS bytes FROM dba_data_files GROUP BY tablespace_name) a, (SELECT tablespace_name, SUM(bytes) AS bytes FROM dba_free_space GROUP BY tablespace_name) b WHERE a.tablespace_name = b.tablespace_name(+)
SELECT owner, object_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM dba_objects WHERE status != 'VALID' GROUP BY owner, object_type
SELECT sid, serial#, username, osuser, program, machine, sql_id, blocking_session FROM v$session WHERE blocking_session IS NOT NULL
SELECT sequence#, first_time, next_time, archived, applied FROM v$archived_log WHERE first_time > SYSDATE - 1 ORDER BY sequence# DESC
